title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Volkswagen India Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Volkswagen India Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Volkswagen India Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
